description: All excavated blocks within the range are filled (i.e., restored for calculation purposes). Use the keywords to assign the blocks, boundary contacts, or internal contacts to a group (and optionally a slot) when filled.

keywords.name: block-group
keywords.description: Assign filled blocks to the group s1 .

keywords.name: boundary-contact-group
keywords.description: Assign boundary contacts of filled blocks to the group s1 .

keywords.name: internal-contact-group
keywords.description: Assign internal contacts of filled blocks to the group s1 .
